calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Daniel F. McLennon, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 4D INTERNET SOLUTIONS, INC., a CA Corporation.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CASS COSTELLO, an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Bruce Randall sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $37,288.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,218.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $597.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $ 41,103.00
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2014 Continued To Jul-30-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
